description:
This quiz tests practical skills in context window management, token budgeting, retrieval strategies, and prompt structuring for production-grade AI systems. It features an intermediate-to-advanced difficulty curve that begins accessibly but quickly escalates to address real-world edge cases and failure modes. The teaching tone is pragmatic and no-nonsense, prioritizing engineering reality over theoretical hype.
Topics: Context windows, Token budgets, Retrieval mechanisms, Prompt structure, AI failure modes, Prompt caching, Hybrid search
Audience: AI engineers and developers building production LLM applications
